name: Sentry
description: Error monitoring and observability platform that provides RESTful APIs for accessing organizations, projects, issues, events, and configuration.

auth_methods.note: Docs explicitly document OAuth2 and 'Auth Tokens' used as Bearer tokens (Authorization: Bearer <token>).

credential_access.note: Auth tokens can be created by users from the dashboard (Account settings) without requiring sales or admin approval; documentation shows UI steps to create personal tokens. Organization tokens can be created from Org settings by authorized members.

api_surface.note: API reference shows a wide set of REST endpoints (projects, organizations, issues, events, etc.) with base URL https://sentry.io/api/0/ indicating broad coverage of product objects.

buildability.note: Public REST API docs exist and developers can self-issue auth tokens from the dashboard; therefore integrations can be built today without manual approvals.

queries: Sentry contact sales enterprise API access
